message:
test(engine): add and expand integration tests for module resolver,
GC pause, runtime diagnostics CLI, frankenctl, statistical validation,
and existing enrichment/verification suites

New test files:
- module_resolver_integration.rs: 152-line test suite covering specifier
  resolution, bare-import mapping, circular dependency detection, and
  graph determinism
- runtime_diagnostics_cli_integration.rs: 99-line CLI integration tests
  for new diagnostic subcommands (memory snapshot, extension health,
  lease status, GC metrics)
- franken_lockstep_runner_cli.rs: 79-line CLI test for lockstep replay
  modes and evidence output
- frankenctl_cli.rs: CLI integration tests for the new frankenctl binary
  covering benchmark orchestration and replay workflows
- rgc_statistical_validation_pipeline.rs: integration tests for the
  RGC-702 statistical validation pipeline validating variance/confidence
  guardrails

Updated test files:
- benchmark_e2e_integration.rs: add harness-contract validation and
  environment-manifest round-trip tests (+31 lines)
- gc_pause_integration.rs: expand pause-budget and histogram tests
  (+53 lines)
- stdlib_integration.rs: overhaul to match expanded ES2020+ stdlib
  baseline with frozen intrinsics and Realm isolation (+129/-106 lines)
- rgc_fault_injection_chaos_verification_pack.rs: refined fault
  injection scenarios (+24 lines)
- rgc_runtime_semantics_verification_pack.rs: expanded semantics
  coverage (+31 lines)
- Minor fixes across: counterexample_synthesizer, policy_as_data,
  runtime_comparison_gate, runtime_decision_theory,
  semantic_contract_baseline, runtime_observability,
  parser_grammar_closure_backlog, tail_latency_memory_hardening

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 use std::collections::{BTreeMap, BTreeSet};
 
 use frankenengine_engine::counterexample_synthesizer::{

     InterferenceKind, MinimalityEvidence, RegressionCorpus, SynthesisConfig, SynthesisError,
